mapper.insert: INSERT INTO env_data(device_id, device_code, temperature, humidity, light, smoke, collect_time) VALUES(#{deviceId}, #{deviceCode}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{light}, #{smoke}, #{collectTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM env_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM env_data
AND device_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM env_data WHERE DATE(collect_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT AVG(temperature) FROM env_data WHERE DATE(collect_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT AVG(humidity) FROM env_data WHERE DATE(collect_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT HOUR(collect_time) as hour, AVG(temperature) as avg_temp, AVG(humidity) as avg_humidity FROM env_data WHERE DATE(collect_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(collect_time) ORDER BY hour
